name: Pratapavarali
notes: Vakra-oudava shadava janya of Harikambhoji (mela 28); arohana: S R₂ M₁ P D₂ P Ṡ (vakra P, N₂ and G₃ omitted), avarohana: Ṡ D₂ P M₁ G₃ R₂ S (N₂ omitted); eka-raga — sole composition is Tyagaraja's Vinana Asakoni Yunnanu Ra (adi); close similarity to Kapi Narayani which adds N₂
